mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.appointment_no AS appointmentNo, a.member_id AS memberId, fm.name AS memberName, a.doctor_id AS doctorId, d.name AS doctorName, d.title AS doctorTitle, a.department_id AS departmentId, dp.name AS departmentName, a.schedule_id AS scheduleId, a.appointment_date AS appointmentDate, a.time_slot AS timeSlot, a.status, a.remark, a.created_at AS createdAt FROM appointments a LEFT JOIN family_members fm ON fm.id = a.member_id LEFT JOIN doctors d ON d.id = a.doctor_id LEFT JOIN departments dp ON dp.id = a.department_id WHERE a.patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC, a.id DESC
